name: Pixie Dust Fertilizer
effect: Increase base production of Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths by +600 and reduce their cost multipliers by -0.02.

name: Fairy Workers
effect: Increase production of Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths based on assistants owned.

name: Spellsmith
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.

name: Fairy Cuisine
effect: Autoclick based on active spells.

name: Golden Pots
effect: 100% of Farms/Inns/Blacksmiths production added to clicking reward. +20% FC find chance.

name: Swarm of Fairies
effect: Gain assistants based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.

name: Fairy Gem Bonus
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on Fairy Chanting activity time this Era.

name: Rainbow Link
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.

name: Kind Hearts
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Good Buildings built.

name: Elven Mint
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance by 100%. Also autoclick 3 times per second.

name: Sylvan Treasure Frills
effect: 50% of total building production added to base clicking reward.

name: Ancient Clicking Arts
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Reincarnation.

name: Elven Emissary
effect: Increase clicking reward based on Good buildings built. Offline FC gains +200%.

name: Elven Efficiency
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on FC found this Era.

name: Secret Clicking Techniques
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.

name: Elven Diplomacy
effect: Clicks count more based on FC found this Era.

name: Elven Luck
effect: 1% click chance: gain (15,000 x Autoclick Power)% of production. Manual clicks bonus scales with Ascension. Also gain FC based on Reincarnations.

name: Elven Treasure Casing
effect: Increase FC find chance based on trophies unlocked.

name: Holy Bells
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on buildings built.

name: Angelic Determination
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on spells cast this Era.

name: Angel Feathers
effect: Increase FC find chance based on active spells.

name: Guardian Angels
effect: Increase base production of Cathedral/Dark Temple/Monastery by +98,000 and their production based on quantity.

name: Angelic Wisdom
effect: Increase spell durations and multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 50%.

name: Archangel Feathers
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration.

name: Magical Gates
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on time spent as Good this Reincarnation.

name: Angelic Domination
effect: Increase gem production bonus based on God's Hand activity time this Era. Reduce all spell costs by 50%.

name: Wings of Liberty
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on duration of your longest spell.

name: Strong Currency
effect: Gain assistants based on FC found this Era.

name: Slave Trading
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Evil buildings built.

name: Cheap Materials
effect: Tax Collection is worth more seconds based on buildings built.

name: Goblin Economists
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on current Coins.

name: Hobgoblin Gladiators
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Tax Collection worth.

name: Goblin Central Bank
effect: Each spell cast triggers free Tax Collections based on Maximum Mana.

name: Black Market
effect: Mult increase gem bonus based on Gems owned. Also increase offline production based on TC casts this Era.

name: Green Fingers Discount
effect: Gain Coins randomly every 120s based on production x time this Reincarnation. Works offline.

name: The Walking Dead
effect: Increase FC find chance based on assistants owned.

name: Deadened Muscles
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.

name: Death Temples
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.

name: Corse Supply
effect: Gain assistants based on time spent this Era.

name: Plagued Buildings
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on activity time of your most used spell this Era.

name: Torture Chambers
effect: Increase production of Royal Castle/Evil Fortress/Iron Stronghold based on assistants owned.

name: Infernal Magic
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Hell Portals built.

name: Demon Overseers
effect: Increase production of the three highest building tiers based on Trophies unlocked.

name: Demonic Presence
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Evil spells cast this Reincarnation.

name: Colossal Forge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on buildings built.

name: Charged Clicks
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively and multiplicatively based on clicks made this Era.

name: Titan Obelisk
effect: Increase FC find chance based on time spent as Neutral this Reincarnation.

name: Charged Structures
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Lightning Strike activity time this Era.

name: Druidic Vocabulary
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on tier — best bonus to lowest tiers.

name: Bardic Knowledge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.

name: Shapeshifting
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on assistants owned.

name: Territorial Expanse
effect: Increase production of Citadel/Necropolis/Labyrinth based on assistants owned.

name: Deep Memory
effect: Mult increase assistants based on time in your longest Era this Reincarnation.

name: Gold Synthesis
effect: Increase production of Neutral buildings based on current Coins.

name: Mitosis
effect: Gain assistants based on buildings built.

name: Overgrowth
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest buildings built this Reincarnation.

name: Magical Treasures
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on assistants owned.

name: Mining Prodigies
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Excavation depth.

name: Battlehammers
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Dwarven FC found this Era.

name: Underworld Tyranny
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as Evil this Reincarnation.

name: Shadow Advance
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.

name: Blood Sacrifices
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Dark Temples built this Reincarnation.

name: Dragonscales
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time as Neutral this Reincarnation. Better on Stone Pillars, Labyrinths, Hall of Legends.

name: Imposing Presence
effect: Increase Mana Regen based on Neutral buildings. While White Breath active: mult increase assistants based on Dragon time this Era.

name: Dragonborn
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on all-time Dragon playtime.

name: Sharp Claws
effect: Mult increase Royal Exchange bonus and FC find chance based on clicks made this Era.

name: Holy Crusaders
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on spells cast this Era.

name: Heresiarchs
effect: Mult increase Mana Regeneration based on Evil spell activity time this Reincarnation.

name: Trade Lords
effect: Increase Mana Regen and FC find chance based on offline time this Reincarnation.

name: Energy Recharge
effect: Mult increase Maximum Mana based on time as Order this Reincarnation. Also improve Precognition.

name: Archon Pride
effect: Mult increase assistants based on Lineage level. Also increase offline mana produced based on Lineage level.

name: Spiritual Bindings
effect: Mult increase assistants based on offline time this Reincarnation. Spell casts/activity count more.

name: Flashy Storm
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on assistants owned.

name: Infinite Improvements
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time as Balance this Reincarnation.

name: Stonecarving
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Excavation depth.

name: Bedrock Foundation
effect: Increase base production of each building based on their tier.
